title: Post-Wave5 Max-Power Rectification & Comparative Proof Campaign
notes: Superseded during L0 of the post-Wave5 execution campaign.
Retained for historical lineage only. Do not use as live scheduling law.

explicit_non_changes: no edits to frozen substrate concepts C001-C010 without constitutional amendment
no parallel truth cores or authority families
no claim widening without benchmark evidence
no historical proof laundering as current-head capability
no complexity growth unless it closes a contradiction or improves comparative proof
no semantic-router promotion before ordered proof exists
no enterprise API platform before narrow verifier wedge is real

objective.primary: Transform KT from SCOPED_BOUNDED_CURRENT_HEAD_ORGANISM into the strongest truthful approximation of: one current-head runtime harder to attack as architecture theater, one verifier stack stronger than same-host packaged replay, one adaptive runtime with organs benchmarked and promoted honestly, one narrow real buyer-safe product wedge, and one comparative-proof bundle showing where KT wins and where it still loses.
success_definition: C007 repo-root import fragility eliminated with canonical install model
C016 remote provider auth yields proven live inference success
C006 externality ceiling upgraded from E1 to E2 minimum
C005 router ambition closed by ordered proof or honest demotion
Every runtime organ in earned LIVE_BOUNDED or explicit ARCHIVE_QUARANTINED
Growth stack fused to runtime truth with receipt-chained lifecycle
Comparative proof exists in KT's real category
Narrow product wedge deployable and verifiable

C005.name: ROUTER_AMBITION_EXCEEDS_IMPLEMENTATION
C005.description: Router is keyword-only. No semantic routing. No learned routing. Doctrine implies swarm routing.

C006.name: EXTERNALITY_CEILING_REMAINS_BOUNDED
C006.description: Verifier is same-host packaged replay. No outsider trustlessness. No detached verifier.

C007.name: REPO_ROOT_IMPORT_FRAGILITY
C007.description: No canonical install model. pyproject.toml has packages=[]. Import truth guard depends on path setup.

C016.name: REMOTE_PROVIDER_AUTH_ONLY_FAIL_CLOSED_OUTCOMES
C016.description: Provider resilience is real but no recorded evidence of successful authenticated live inference.

organ_status_board_h0.description: Frozen baseline organ status at campaign start. Every organ must transition from this state to a terminal state by campaign end.

statuses.CORE_LIVE: 100% real executable logic, proven by tests, no stubs
statuses.LIVE_BOUNDED: Real logic with bounded scope (e.g., 2/12 providers active)
statuses.STUB_BOUNDED: Interface contracts real, execution is stub/fake/hardcoded
statuses.PROTOCOL_ONLY: Type hints and dataclass definitions only

lanes.title: Freeze Current Win
lanes.objective: Seal post-Wave5 bounded organism as H0 baseline before any expansion.

work_packages.intent: Emit cryptographic baseline of all runtime, governance, and config files.
Run full test suite and record non-regression floor.
Emit the organ status board as a governance artifact.

params.organ_statuses: from organ_status_board_h0 in this work order

work_packages.intent: Fix pyproject.toml package discovery to expose kt namespace.
Add missing __init__.py files for canonical import chain.
Add main() function to kt/entrypoint.py for CLI invocation.
Verify pip install works and all imports resolve.

commands: python -c 'from kt.entrypoint import invoke; print("IMPORT OK")'

work_packages.intent: Add canonical install verification to CI pipeline.
Prove import truth guard works in both repo-root and installed-package mode.

lanes.title: Prove Live Provider Execution — Close C016
lanes.objective: Move from auth-bounded fail-closed to proven current-head live inference.

work_packages.intent: Create and run live inference proof against active providers.
Prove circuit breaker, rate limiter, and backoff under fault injection.
Wire live receipts into eval harness for optional live evaluation.

params.binding: optional live provider mode with receipt binding to eval results

work_packages.intent: Execute and store repeated live inference evidence.

lanes.title: Runtime Organ Ignition
lanes.objective: Force every stub organ into earned reality or explicit demotion.

work_packages.intent: Replace hash-derived scoring with real provider-backed cognitive execution.

params.failure_mode: STEP_STATUS_DEGRADED with score=0 and failure artifact

params.approach: rule-based planner mapping schema_id patterns to step sequences

work_packages.intent: Implement real contradiction detection and bounded resolution.

detection_types.self_reference: circular dependency detection in artifact refs
detection_types.contradiction: conflicting claims detection in assertion set
detection_types.infinite_loop: repeated schema_id pattern detection in trace

work_packages.intent: Implement real replay of bounded step sequences.

params.logic: load state vault chain for fork context, iterate entries by trace_id, validate hashes, increment steps_executed

work_packages.intent: Replace hardcoded coherence with real pairwise variance computation.
Unlock plan/execute path for LIVE_HASHED mode.

params.logic: query provider_registry for available live providers, select by domain tags from router_policy_registry.json, construct plan with budget allocations and timeouts
execute through existing execute_council_request(), bind result to plan hash, return actual output hashes

work_packages.intent: Wire meters to actual organ consumption and add budget violation governance events.

params.token_meter: consume from provider receipt token count
params.step_meter: consume from cognitive result step count

lanes.title: Upgrade Externality — Close C006
lanes.objective: Move from same-host packaged replay to real outsider-verifiable proof.

work_packages.intent: Build single-file verifier with zero KT internal dependencies.
Generate SLSA v1.0 provenance for critical artifacts.
Generate CycloneDX SBOM from dependency manifest.
Generate in-toto step attestations for critical CI chain.
Verify Rekor inclusion proofs for Cosign signatures.
Prove deterministic replay on a fresh machine.
Generate TUF metadata for verifier and artifact distribution.

lanes.title: Growth Stack Convergence
lanes.objective: Fuse growth tooling into lawful runtime truth with receipt-chained lifecycle.

work_packages.intent: Define complete adapter lifecycle with receipt chain.
Build automated promotion gate with evidence requirements.
Build automated demotion with TTL and failure tracking.
Bind training outputs to promotion pipeline with provenance.
Bind tournament results to promotion pipeline.
Define rollback conditions and governance events.

lanes.title: Router Ratification — Close C005
lanes.objective: Close router ambition gap in required doctrinal order.

work_packages.intent: Formalize keyword router as static baseline with scorecard.
Run shadow router alongside static for comparison data.

params.behavior: make routing decision in parallel, compare to static, record agreement/disagreement, DO NOT use for actual execution

work_packages.intent: Prove routing adds value over always picking best single adapter.

params.decision: if best-static wins, routing adds no value and should not be promoted

work_packages.intent: Only if 6.1-6.3 prove routing adds value: implement embedding-based routing.

params.requires: governance amendment to router_policy_registry.json before activation
params.monitoring: drift guard for routing distribution shifts

work_packages.intent: Only after learned router proven: enable multi-provider deliberation.

lanes.title: External Challenge & Benchmark
lanes.objective: Generate real comparative proof in KT's actual category.

work_packages.intent: Run industry-standard LM benchmarks through governed execution.
Run same benchmarks against comparator configurations.
Benchmark what KT uniquely offers.

benchmarks.name: fail_closed_discipline
benchmarks.method: 100 adversarial prompts, measure rejection vs false positive

benchmarks.name: provider_failover
benchmarks.method: kill primary mid-request, measure recovery + receipt integrity

benchmarks.name: replay_consistency
benchmarks.method: same request 10x, measure output hash consistency

work_packages.intent: Generate machine-readable comparative evidence.
Accept and process external adversarial inputs.

params.output: all receipts, failures, governance events published

lanes.title: Narrow Product Wedge
lanes.objective: Build verifier/assurance product without pretending whole civilization is product-ready.

work_packages.intent: Create FastAPI service with OpenAPI auto-generation.
Create production multi-stage Docker image.
Create local development composition.
Document every error code with resolution guidance.
Define environment-specific configurations.
Package standalone verifier for external distribution.

lanes.title: Standards & Law Alignment
lanes.objective: Become legible to regulators, auditors, and enterprise governance.

work_packages.intent: Map KT controls to NIST AI Risk Management Framework.
Map KT to NIST SP 800-218/218A SSDF.
Map KT governance to ISO/IEC 42001 AIMS.
Map KT controls to EU AI Act requirements.
Create redacted evidence bundle for external auditors.

parallel_group_1.note: Independent — install model and provider proof run in parallel

parallel_group_2.note: Independent organ upgrades not requiring live providers

sequential_after_lane_2.note: Require live provider proof before provider-backed execution

final_parallel.note: Product wedge and standards mapping run in parallel after benchmarks

execution_dag.critical_path: LANE_0 → LANE_2 → LANE_3(cognitive+council) → LANE_5 → LANE_6 → LANE_7 → LANE_8

completion.freeze_statement: Post-Wave5 Max-Power Rectification Campaign complete: all four live contradictions closed or honestly demoted, runtime organs ignited or archived, comparative proof bundle exists, narrow product wedge deployable, standards mappings filed, externality class upgraded.
